Name: insertUsers
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "display_name", $3::citext AS "email", $4::bool AS "disabled", $5::text AS "default_role", $6::varchar AS "locale") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."users" ("id", "display_name", "email", "disabled", "default_role", "locale") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."display_name", check_mutation_result."email", check_mutation_result."disabled", check_mutation_result."default_role", check_mutation_result."locale" FROM check_mutation_result RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."display_name" AS "displayName", "mutation_result.r.defaultRoleByRole"."defaultRoleByRole" AS "defaultRoleByRole" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.defaultRoleByRole.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."roles" WHERE "mutation_result"."default_role" = "role" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.defaultRoleByRole.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "defaultRoleByRole" FROM "mutation_result.r.defaultRoleByRole.base") AS "mutation_result.r.defaultRoleByRole" ON ('true')) AS "_e"))
